ai_agents.name: AI Agents from Database
ai_agents.description: Dynamically loaded from database - all published agents

workflows.name: Maintenance Checklist Generator
workflows.description: Generates comprehensive maintenance checklists based on equipment type and maintenance level

function.name: generate_maintenance_checklist
function.description: Generates a comprehensive step-by-step maintenance checklist for a piece of equipment. Use this when the user asks for a maintenance checklist, procedure list, or inspection steps.

equipment_type.description: Type of equipment (e.g. centrifugal pump, gas compressor, heat exchanger, motor)

maintenance_level.description: Level of maintenance: routine (daily checks), preventive (scheduled), corrective (after failure)

workflows.name: Incident Report Analyzer
workflows.description: Analyzes incident reports and extracts key information, root causes, and recommendations

function.name: analyze_incident_report
function.description: Analyzes a maintenance or safety incident report to extract root causes, contributing factors, and corrective action recommendations. Use when the user describes an incident, failure, or near-miss.

incident_description.description: Full description of the incident including what happened, when, where, and equipment involved

equipment_id.description: Equipment tag or ID involved in the incident (optional)

workflows.name: Equipment Maintenance Scheduler
workflows.description: Creates maintenance schedules based on equipment criticality and operational requirements

function.name: create_equipment_maintenance_schedule
function.description: Creates a time-based maintenance schedule for a list of equipment, ranked by criticality and operational requirements. Returns a prioritized schedule with recommended dates.

equipment_list.description: List of equipment tag IDs to schedule (e.g. ['P-101','C-201','HE-305'])

time_horizon_days.description: Number of days to plan ahead (e.g. 30, 90, 365)

tools.name: Parts Inventory Checker
tools.description: Checks parts inventory availability and provides stock levels

function.name: check_parts_inventory
function.description: Checks real-time stock availability for one or more spare parts by their part numbers. Returns current stock levels and warehouse locations.

part_numbers.description: List of part/material numbers to check (e.g. ['SAP-123456', '7890-SEAL'])

tools.name: Equipment Database Lookup
tools.description: Retrieves equipment specifications, manuals, and technical data

function.name: lookup_equipment
function.description: Retrieves technical specifications, operating parameters, and maintenance manuals for a specific piece of equipment by its tag ID. Use when the user asks about equipment specs, ratings, or technical data.

equipment_id.description: Equipment tag ID or name (e.g. P-101, C-201, HE-305)

include_manuals.description: Whether to include links to maintenance manuals (default: false)

tools.name: Safety Procedure Validator
tools.description: Validates maintenance procedures against safety standards and regulations

function.name: validate_safety_procedure
function.description: Validates a maintenance procedure against Saudi Aramco safety standards (GI, SAES) and international standards (OSHA, ISO). Returns compliance score and missing safety steps such as LOTO, PPE requirements, and permit-to-work. Use whenever the user submits a procedure for safety review.

procedure_text.description: The full text of the maintenance procedure to validate

equipment_type.description: Type of equipment the procedure applies to (e.g. rotating equipment, pressure vessel, electrical)

tools.name: Maintenance Cost Estimator
tools.description: Estimates maintenance costs including labor, parts, and downtime

function.name: estimate_maintenance_cost
function.description: Calculates estimated total cost for a maintenance activity including labor hours, spare parts, and production downtime losses. Use when the user asks about cost, budget, or financial impact of maintenance.

maintenance_type.description: Type of maintenance activity (e.g. bearing replacement, seal overhaul, annual shutdown)

duration_hours.description: Estimated duration of the maintenance activity in hours

tools.name: Technical Document Search
tools.description: Searches technical documentation, manuals, and procedures

function.name: search_technical_documents
function.description: Searches the internal technical documentation library including SOPs, GIs, engineering standards, equipment manuals, and procedures. Use when the user asks about a standard, procedure, or technical reference document.

query.description: Search query describing what document or information is needed

doc_types.description: Filter by document types: ['manual', 'sop', 'gi', 'saes', 'procedure', 'drawing']. Leave empty to search all.

tools.name: PDF Merge Tool
tools.description: Merges multiple PDF files into a single document

function.name: merge_pdf_files
function.description: Merges two or more PDF files into a single document. Use when the user wants to combine PDFs, append one PDF to another, or consolidate multiple reports into one file.

input_files.description: Ordered list of absolute file paths to merge

output_file.description: Absolute path for the merged output PDF

tools.name: PDF Split Tool
tools.description: Splits PDF into multiple files by pages or ranges

function.name: split_pdf_file
function.description: Splits a PDF into separate files by page ranges or by individual pages. Use when the user wants to extract specific pages or chapters from a PDF.

input_file.description: Absolute path to the source PDF

output_dir.description: Directory where split files will be saved

split_value.description: Page number, range end, or N for every_n_pages

tools.name: PDF Text Extractor
tools.description: Extracts text from PDF documents with optional OCR for scanned documents

function.name: extract_text_from_pdf
function.description: Extracts readable text from a PDF document. Supports optional OCR for scanned or image-based PDFs. Use when the user wants to read, search, or process the text content of a PDF.

input_file.description: Absolute path to the PDF file

page_numbers.description: Specific page numbers to extract (1-indexed). Leave empty for all pages.

use_ocr.description: Set true for scanned/image PDFs that contain no selectable text (default: false)

tools.name: PDF Table Extractor
tools.description: Extracts tables from PDF documents

function.name: extract_tables_from_pdf
function.description: Extracts all tables from a PDF and returns them as structured data. Use when the user wants to get tabular data (equipment lists, maintenance records, cost tables) from a PDF.

page_numbers.description: Page numbers to search for tables. Leave empty for all pages.

tools.name: Convert to PDF
tools.description: Converts images, Word documents, and text files to PDF format

function.name: convert_to_pdf
function.description: Converts an image, Word document, or text file to PDF format. Use when the user wants to create a PDF from another file type.

input_file.description: Absolute path to the source file

output_file.description: Absolute path for the output PDF

tools.name: PDF to Word Converter
tools.description: Converts PDF documents to Word format

function.name: convert_pdf_to_word
function.description: Converts a PDF document to an editable Word (.docx) file. Use when the user needs to edit a PDF or extract its content into Word format.

input_file.description: Absolute path to the source PDF

output_file.description: Absolute path for the output .docx file

tools.name: PDF Information
tools.description: Retrieves metadata and information about PDF files

function.name: get_pdf_info
function.description: Returns metadata about a PDF file: page count, title, author, creation date, file size, and whether it is encrypted or scanned.

input_file.description: Absolute path to the PDF file

tools.name: Local Offline OCR
tools.description: Performs OCR on images using local offline models (EasyOCR) - no internet required

function.name: ocr_image
function.description: Extracts text from an image file using offline EasyOCR. Supports 80+ languages including Arabic and English. No internet required. Use when the user uploads a photo, screenshot, or scanned image and wants the text extracted.

image_path.description: Absolute path to the image file (jpg, png, tiff, bmp)

tools.name: Local PDF OCR
tools.description: Performs OCR on PDF documents using local offline models

function.name: ocr_pdf
function.description: Performs OCR on a scanned PDF using offline local models (no internet). Extracts text page by page. Use for scanned maintenance manuals, permits, or inspection reports.

pdf_path.description: Absolute path to the scanned PDF

output_format.description: Format for the extracted content (default: text)

tools.name: Word Document Creator
tools.description: Creates Word documents with formatted content, tables, and headings

function.name: create_word_document
function.description: Creates a formatted Word (.docx) document with headings, paragraphs, tables, and lists. Use when the user wants to generate a report, procedure, checklist, or any structured document in Word format.

output_file.description: Absolute path for the output .docx file

tools.name: Word Text Extractor
tools.description: Extracts text and metadata from Word documents

function.name: extract_text_from_word
function.description: Extracts all text content from a Word (.docx) document. Use when the user uploads a Word file and asks about its content.

include_formatting.description: Whether to include heading levels and formatting hints (default: false)

tools.name: Word Headings Extractor
tools.description: Extracts document structure and headings from Word documents

function.name: extract_word_headings
function.description: Extracts the heading structure (table of contents) from a Word document. Use to understand document organization or navigate to specific sections.

tools.name: Word Table Extractor
tools.description: Extracts all tables from Word documents

function.name: extract_tables_from_word
function.description: Extracts all tables from a Word document as structured data. Use when the user needs tabular data from a Word report or form.

tools.name: Word to PDF Converter
tools.description: Converts Word documents to PDF format

function.name: convert_word_to_pdf
function.description: Converts a Word (.docx) document to PDF format. Use when the user wants to share or print a Word document as PDF.

input_file.description: Absolute path to the .docx source file

output_file.description: Absolute path for the output PDF

tools.name: Word to HTML Converter
tools.description: Converts Word documents to HTML format

function.name: convert_word_to_html
function.description: Converts a Word (.docx) document to HTML format for web publishing or email embedding.

input_file.description: Absolute path to the .docx source file

output_file.description: Absolute path for the output .html file

tools.name: Add Table to Word
tools.description: Adds tables to existing Word documents

function.name: add_table_to_word
function.description: Adds a formatted table to an existing Word document. Use when the user wants to insert data tables, equipment lists, or cost breakdowns into a Word file.

input_file.description: Absolute path to the existing .docx file

output_file.description: Absolute path for the modified output

table_data.description: 2D array of cell values (first row = headers)

position.description: Where to insert the table (default: end)

tools.name: Word Document Information
tools.description: Retrieves metadata and statistics about Word documents

function.name: get_word_document_info
function.description: Returns metadata about a Word document: page count, word count, author, creation date, last modified.

tools.name: Excel Reader
tools.description: Reads data from Excel files with support for sheets and ranges

function.name: read_excel_data
function.description: Reads data from an Excel file. Supports selecting a specific sheet and cell range. Returns the data as a structured list. Use when the user uploads an Excel file and asks about its data.

sheet_name.description: Sheet name to read (default: first sheet)

cell_range.description: Excel range notation e.g. 'A1:D20' (default: all data)

as_dataframe.description: Return as structured JSON table (default: true)

tools.name: Excel Creator
tools.description: Creates new Excel files with formatted data and multiple sheets

function.name: create_excel_file
function.description: Creates a new Excel file with formatted data, headers, and optional multiple sheets. Use when the user wants to generate a spreadsheet, report, or data export in Excel format.

output_file.description: Absolute path for the output .xlsx file

data.description: Dict of sheet_name → list of row dicts e.g. {'Sheet1': [{'col1':'val1',...}]}

headers.description: Column headers for the first sheet

tools.name: Excel Modifier
tools.description: Modifies existing Excel files with cell updates, row operations

function.name: modify_excel_file
function.description: Modifies an existing Excel file: updates cell values, adds/removes rows. Use when the user wants to update an existing spreadsheet with new data.

input_file.description: Absolute path to the source .xlsx file

output_file.description: Absolute path for the modified output

modifications.description: List of changes: [{action:'set_cell', sheet:'Sheet1', row:2, col:3, value:'new_value'}]

tools.name: Excel Pivot Table Creator
tools.description: Creates pivot tables from Excel data for analysis

function.name: create_excel_pivot_table
function.description: Creates a pivot table from Excel data for analysis. Use when the user wants to summarize, group, or aggregate data in a spreadsheet.

input_file.description: Absolute path to the source .xlsx file

output_file.description: Absolute path for the output with pivot table

tools.name: Excel Chart Generator
tools.description: Adds charts (bar, line, pie) to Excel files

function.name: add_chart_to_excel
function.description: Adds a chart (bar, line, or pie) to an Excel file. Use when the user wants to visualize Excel data with a chart.

output_file.description: Absolute path for the output with chart

tools.name: Excel Data Analyzer
tools.description: Performs statistical analysis on Excel data

function.name: analyze_excel_data
function.description: Performs statistical analysis on Excel data: mean, median, min, max, standard deviation, correlation. Use when the user wants statistical insights from a spreadsheet.

analysis_type.description: Type of statistical analysis to perform

tools.name: Excel to CSV Converter
tools.description: Converts Excel files to CSV format

function.name: convert_excel_to_csv
function.description: Exports an Excel sheet to CSV format. Use when the user needs to export data for use in another system or analysis tool.

output_file.description: Absolute path for the output .csv file

tools.name: Excel Information
tools.description: Retrieves metadata and information about Excel files

function.name: get_excel_info
function.description: Returns metadata about an Excel file: sheet names, row/column counts, data types per column, and file size.

tools.name: Excel to PDF Converter
tools.description: Converts Excel spreadsheets to PDF format with formatted tables

function.name: convert_excel_to_pdf
function.description: Converts an Excel spreadsheet to PDF with formatted tables. Use when the user wants to share a spreadsheet as a non-editable PDF report.

output_file.description: Absolute path for the output PDF

include_all_sheets.description: Convert all sheets to a single PDF (default: false)

tools.name: Email Draft Generator
tools.description: Generates Outlook-compatible email drafts with recipients and content

function.name: generate_email_draft
function.description: Generates a professional Outlook-compatible email draft with proper formatting. Use when the user asks to write, compose, or draft an email.

body.description: Full email body text (can include markdown formatting)

tools.name: Email Template Generator
tools.description: Creates emails from templates with data auto-fill for maintenance notifications

function.name: create_email_from_template
function.description: Creates an email from a predefined maintenance notification template with auto-filled data. Use for work order notifications, maintenance alerts, or equipment downtime notices.

data.description: Template variables to fill in (depends on template_name)

tools.name: Email Scheduler
tools.description: Schedules emails for future sending with recurrence support

function.name: schedule_email
function.description: Schedules an email to be sent at a future date/time, with optional recurrence. Use when the user wants to set up automated maintenance reminders or recurring notifications.

email_draft.description: Email to schedule: {to, subject, body, cc}

tools.name: Email Parser
tools.description: Parses incoming emails to extract content and attachments

function.name: parse_email_content
function.description: Parses an incoming email to extract sender, recipients, subject, body text, and attachment metadata. Use when the user pastes an email and wants it processed or summarized.

email_content.description: Raw email content or pasted email text

parse_attachments.description: Whether to list attachment names and sizes (default: true)

tools.name: Email Signature Generator
tools.description: Generates HTML email signatures for professional communications

function.name: generate_email_signature
function.description: Generates a professional HTML email signature. Use when the user wants to create or update their email signature.
